result:
Continuity check — from memory, no tools:

**Role boundary (Agent A, per the 2026-07-17 ownership correction):** I own the **standard-only** #16 selection-complete lateral chain (P0/P2/P3S → standard P4) plus **health of the standard array**. **FPS post-processing is Agent C's** — I monitor FPS counts but do **not** run its P4, touch its unfold array `56057327`, its launcher, or its `active_universe_5d/fps/` namespace. I also must **not** rebuild/reinstall the C++ binary while arrays are active, and must **not** touch `uq_4d/corrected/` (that's the orchestrator's 4D repair). The standard-array freeze exception is scoped to my array only, via scheduler overrides.

**Last validated milestone:** Standard P4 stage-1 complete and both hard gates PASSED — **audit GATE1 = 120/120** per-playlist endpoints pass (`p3s_standard_manifest.json`), and **GATE2 = 10/10 merged endpoint ROOTs valid** (each opens with all 4 trees: mc_truth_denom, mc_signal_reco, mc_background, data). P3S itself was 120/120.

**Compute state at my last turn:** The 10 standard endpoint unfolds were launched **detached** (`setsid nohup srun --overlap --jobid=56076881 -w nid004178`, running `run_p4_unfold_std.sh`, CONC=4, `--seed 42`, no `--universe`, valid-skip) on my interactive holder **`56076881` (nid004178)**, which had ~53 min to its ~09:33 UTC wall. Only a few unfolds would finish before that wall; the rest resume on a fresh holder. I did **not** grab a second holder (staying under the 2-job interactive cap for Agent C). Agent C's work sits on **`56076877` (nid004149)** — untouched.

**Next hard gate:** **10/10 endpoint unfolds validated** (`hXSecND_flat` present in each) **before** proceeding to `analyze_universes_5d` → covariance → `p4_validate_active_lateral.py` (PSD/symmetry + comparison vs the old support-limited block). Immediate next action when resumed: check unfold progress; if `56076881` has walled, grab a **fresh** interactive holder (poll by JOBID, avoid nid004149) and relaunch the unfold driver detached to finish the remainder via skip-if-valid. Products stay labeled **CANDIDATE** — delivered to P5B/P6, **no final adoption**, commit gate = ledger + RUN_LOG + STATUS.
